title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
author: Maxwell Zeff
text: OpenAI’s head of safety systems, Johannes Heidecke, told staff this week that he’s leaving the company, WIRED has learned. Heidecke’s departure follows a reorganization that sought to integrate OpenAI’s safety and research teams.You’ve read your last free article.The intersection of technology, power, and culture.
